name: Your wife and her ex
description:
Over the years, your wife has told you a lot about her past, but she never wanted to talk about her ex, Robin. Now you know why.

TW - technically NTR, I suppose

(version 1.0.3 - testing through release)

Another "bonus bot." I learned a new art style and was going to try it out on a private bot, but decided to share instead.
creator: The Real Tom Frost
